title: FAQ | The Backyard & Co.

txt.text: What sets The Backyard & Co. mangoes apart from other suppliers?

The Backyard & Co. mangoes are distinguished by their premium quality, which is a result of our meticulous cultivation practices and commitment to authenticity. Mostly mangoes are sourced from our own orchards and we have tie-ups with local farmers where we combine our natural cultivation practices ensuring freshness and traceability.
How do you ensure the quality and safety of your mangoes during the export process?

We adhere to strict quality control measures at every stage of the export process. This includes regular inspections, adherence to international food safety standards, and the use of proper packaging to maintain freshness.
What varieties of mangoes do you offer for export?

We specialize in Kesar mangoes, which are renowned for their exquisite taste and aroma. Additionally, we have tie-ups with local farmers for other varieties such as Alphonso, Chausa, Dashehari, and Bhagalpuri allowing us to offer a diverse range of mangoes to our customers.
We' love to have you visit our farms.
